expectedEvents.title: Messa, Massimo Silverio, Blak Saagan, Overcharge, Mamuthones, Naga, Devoid of Thought, Kariti, Delrei
expectedEvents.description: A multi-artist music event featuring various bands, including a release show by Blak Saagan, with two stages, a market, distro, food, and drinks.
